tools.name: check_ai_visibility
tools.description: Check the AI visibility (LLMO/GEO) score for a specific domain. Returns the overall score (0-100), scores from 4 AI engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity), citation rate, and industry ranking. Data is based on the AI Visibility Index monthly scan of 104 Japanese EC companies. Useful for LLMO

tools.name: list_ai_visibility_industries
tools.description: List all industries covered by the AI Visibility Index with their average LLMO/GEO scores, company counts, and score ranges. Currently covers 9 Japanese EC industries with 104 companies total. | 9業界のAI可視性スコア平均・企業数・スコア範囲を一覧表示。

tools.name: get_ai_visibility_methodology
tools.description: Get the AI Visibility Index scoring methodology: how LLMO/GEO scores are calculated, which AI engines are tested (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity), query types, scoring formula, and data freshness. | スコアリング方法論（計算式・対象エンジン・クエリ種別・データ更新頻度）。
